summary: The user is seeking tips on organizing their bookshelf after completing a deep clean of their living room. They commit to a 30-minute deep clean session every Sunday and are interested in categorizing their books while deciding what to keep or let go of, as well as creating a Book Memory Wall to display memories associated with their books.
facts: The user completed a deep clean of their living room last Sunday. The user commits to a 30-minute deep clean session every Sunday. The user is interested in organizing their bookshelf by categorizing books into broad categories like fiction and non-fiction, and further into subcategories like genres or topics. The user likes the idea of taking a photo of book covers and writing down associated memories to preserve sentimental value without keeping the physical books. The user has a lot of wall space in their living room and plans to create a Book Memory Wall as a conversation starter. The user prefers a staggered layout for their Book Memory Wall, incorporating different frame sizes and angles for visual interest.
